statement: In every magma, Equation 3020 (`x = ((y * (z * z)) * w) * y`) implies Equation 1361 (`x = y * (((z * x) * w) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0057
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z z)) w) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z x) w) x))
